case_title: JOANNA ISMAEL VS. BLACK ROCK CITY LLC

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ISMAEL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK ROCK CITY LLC
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-01-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-20-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISMAEL, JOANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLACK ROCK CITY LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACK ROCK CITY LLC

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACK ROCK CITY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM GRAHAM--SENIOR ADVISOR OF SPECIAL PROJECTS, COMMUNICATION TEAM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
